# Accordion

An expandable/collapsible sections component for organizing content into togglable panels. Built with composable sub-components for flexible layouts.

## Import

```jsx
import { Accordion } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Accordion` | Root container that manages the accordion state |
| `Accordion.Item` | Individual collapsible section (requires a unique `value` prop) |
| `Accordion.ItemTrigger` | Clickable header that toggles the section |
| `Accordion.ItemContent` | Animated container that shows/hides content |
| `Accordion.ItemBody` | Inner content wrapper with padding |
| `Accordion.ItemIndicator` | Visual indicator (chevron/arrow) showing open/closed state |

## Props

### Accordion (Root)

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `type` | `"single" \| "multiple"` | `"single"` | Whether one or multiple items can be open at a time |
| `collapsible` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether all items can be collapsed (only for `type="single"`) |
| `defaultValue` | `string[] \| string` | - | The initially open item(s) |
| `value` | `string[] \| string` | - | Controlled open item(s) |
| `onValueChange` | `function` | - | Callback when open items change |
| `variant` | `"outline" \| "subtle" \| "enclosed" \| "plain"` | `"outline"` | The visual style variant |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the accordion |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

### Accordion.Item

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | Unique identifier for this item (required) |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | `false` | Disables the item |

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Accordion type="single" collapsible>
  <Accordion.Item value="item-1">
    <Accordion.ItemTrigger>
      Section One
      <Accordion.ItemIndicator />
    </Accordion.ItemTrigger>
    <Accordion.ItemContent>
      <Accordion.ItemBody>
        Content for section one.
      </Accordion.ItemBody>
    </Accordion.ItemContent>
  </Accordion.Item>

  <Accordion.Item value="item-2">
    <Accordion.ItemTrigger>
      Section Two
      <Accordion.ItemIndicator />
    </Accordion.ItemTrigger>
    <Accordion.ItemContent>
      <Accordion.ItemBody>
        Content for section two.
      </Accordion.ItemBody>
    </Accordion.ItemContent>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>
```

### Multiple items open

```jsx
<Accordion type="multiple" defaultValue={["item-1", "item-3"]}>
  <Accordion.Item value="item-1">
    <Accordion.ItemTrigger>
      First <Accordion.ItemIndicator />
    </Accordion.ItemTrigger>
    <Accordion.ItemContent>
      <Accordion.ItemBody>First content</Accordion.ItemBody>
    </Accordion.ItemContent>
  </Accordion.Item>

  <Accordion.Item value="item-2">
    <Accordion.ItemTrigger>
      Second <Accordion.ItemIndicator />
    </Accordion.ItemTrigger>
    <Accordion.ItemContent>
      <Accordion.ItemBody>Second content</Accordion.ItemBody>
    </Accordion.ItemContent>
  </Accordion.Item>

  <Accordion.Item value="item-3">
    <Accordion.ItemTrigger>
      Third <Accordion.ItemIndicator />
    </Accordion.ItemTrigger>
    <Accordion.ItemContent>
      <Accordion.ItemBody>Third content</Accordion.ItemBody>
    </Accordion.ItemContent>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>
```

### With default open item

```jsx
<Accordion type="single" collapsible defaultValue="faq-1">
  <Accordion.Item value="faq-1">
    <Accordion.ItemTrigger>
      What is this? <Accordion.ItemIndicator />
    </Accordion.ItemTrigger>
    <Accordion.ItemContent>
      <Accordion.ItemBody>This is an FAQ section.</Accordion.ItemBody>
    </Accordion.ItemContent>
  </Accordion.Item>
</Accordion>
```

### Controlled

```jsx
const [value, setValue] = useState(["item-1"]);

<Accordion type="multiple" value={value} onValueChange={(details) => setValue(details.value)}>
  {/* items */}
</Accordion>
```

## Features

- Supports single or multiple open items via the `type` prop
- Collapsible mode allows all items to be closed
- Animated content expand/collapse transitions
- Supports controlled and uncontrolled usage
- Visual indicator component for open/closed state
- Supports multiple visual variants and sizes
- Each item requires a unique `value` for identification
- Forwards refs on all sub-components
